intro: Where my attention is, roughly. Updated in waves rather than continuously — this is a snapshot, not a feed.

sections.label: Working on
items: Two policy briefings for The Good Lobby Italia, both on civic-space narrowing in Southeast Europe.
A multi-org coalition note on migration-rights litigation, due before the summer break.
Designing a 3-session community-organising course for an Italian NGO network.

sections.label: Reading
items: Adam Tooze — Crashed (slow second read, footnotes this time).
Anything Isabella Weber has published in the last six months.
Comics, between the policy work — currently Sandman Universe.

sections.label: Writing
items: Weekly: The Continental Brief on Substack.
On the desk: a piece on Europe's quiet rearmament balance sheet.

sections.label: Travel & where I'll be
items: Brussels for a coalition meeting, late June.

sections.label: Off the clock
items: Boxing once a week. Slowly getting less terrible at it.
Trying to learn enough Greek to embarrass myself politely in Athens.
Cooking from the same five recipes.

footnote: Inspired by Derek Sivers' /now movement (nownownow.com). Updated when the picture meaningfully changes — usually once every few weeks.
